recommendations.title: Army of Thieves
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman recruits bank teller Ludwig Dieter to lead a group of aspiring thieves on a top-secret heist during the early stages of the zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: The Manny
recommendations.overview: Young industrialist Clemens Klina doesn't have time for his children and accidentally hires a man who actually came to him, seeking revenge, as a nanny for them.

recommendations.title: We Are Pregnant
recommendations.overview: It seems simple: an egg + sperm = one embryo. But if your sperm is "few, vague and abnormal" and your woman is premenopausal at age 37, things start to get complicated.

recommendations.title: Vicky Donor
recommendations.overview: A man is brought in by an infertility doctor to supply him with his sperm, where he becomes the biggest sperm donor for his clinic.

recommendations.title: What a Man
recommendations.overview: What a man is a comedy that tells the story of a young professor, Alex (Matthias Schweighofer), who after being left by his girlfriend Caroline (Mavie Hörbiger), begins a journey to know himself. But how do you overcome the difficulties of a man toda

recommendations.title: Break Up Man
recommendations.overview: BREAK UP MAN is an odd couple road movie and tells the story of Henri, who works for a break up agency in Berlin and on behalf of those who want to separate themselves from their future “ex”-partners. To complete his most important mission he is conf

recommendations.title: Made in America
recommendations.overview: A young black woman discovers that her father was a sperm donor, and if that wasn't bad enough, he's white.

recommendations.title: Starbuck
recommendations.overview: David Wozniak is a perpetual adolescent who discovers that, as a sperm donor, he has fathered 533 children. He is advised that more than 100 of his offspring are trying to force the fertility clinic to reveal the true identity of "Starbuck," the pseu

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: After a woman's at-home DNA test reveals multiple half-siblings, she discovers a shocking scheme involving donor sperm and a popular fertility doctor.

recommendations.title: The Swimmers
recommendations.overview: From war-torn Syria to the 2016 Rio Olympics, two young sisters embark on a risky voyage, putting their hearts and their swimming skills to heroic use.
